spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates letter-spacing intervention across a grid of 9 scripts, utilizing custom interactive DOM measurements to display browser compliance status.

interactive.rationale: Provides interactive sliders for letter-spacing and font-size, plus a rich custom mixed-script textarea box with instant rendering update.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Perfectly describes the CSS spec typography rules and Chrome 138 behavior in contrast to legacy engines.

edge_cases.rationale: Explicitly features mixed-script input testing alongside clean legend styling and support detection logic.

references.rationale: Omit links to external specifications or the main ChromeStatus tracker 4885407109742592.

design_system.rationale: Layout uses clean CSS grid partitions, standard fonts, custom colored indicators, and fully meets the design instructions.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus reference link
openQuestions.detail: To comply with repository rules, every concept page must include a link to the ChromeStatus feature entry (https://chromestatus.com/feature/4885407109742592). Add it to the crumbs or see also section.

summary: A highly comprehensive live-editor showcasing 9 distinct scripts alongside live measurement probes, which successfully maps all typography variables but forgets to include the mandatory ChromeStatus outbound link.
